start:prod.name: Start (PROD mode – dist viewer)
start:prod.command: cross-env BUILD_SOURCE='' BUILD=prod npm run start:dist

build:test.name: Build (TEST bundle)
build:test.command: cross-env BUILD_SOURCE=IIIF BUILD=test npm run build

build:prod.name: Build (PROD bundle)
build:prod.command: cross-env BUILD_SOURCE='' BUILD=prod npm run build:dist
